The '''Imperial Droid Corporation''' was the primary manufacturer of [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]] and combat [[Droid/Legends|droids]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was created when the chief droid developers - [[Bansche Tech/Legends|Banche Tech]], [[Sencil Corporation]], [[Reiber Manufacturing]] and [[SGI Systems, Inc.|SFI Systems]] - were organized together by the Empire to streamline their productions to the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor's]] desires.

{{Company-stub}}
